query:
CREATE TABLE `revenue_groups` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`groupId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'voice_pack',
	`customerExternalId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`customerName` varchar(255) DEFAULT '',
	`totalRevenue` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`notes` text,
	`autoDetected` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `revenue_groups_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `revenue_groups_groupId_unique` UNIQUE(`groupId`)
);
ALTER TABLE `services` ADD `revenueGroupId` varchar(64) DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE `services` ADD `revenueGroupLabel` varchar(255) DEFAULT '';
